userFlows: Log in to an existing account
testIdeas: Verify Home page loads with product listings
Verify 'Contact' modal opens and form submission behavior
Verify 'About us' modal opens and video playback
Verify 'Sign up' modal opens and user registration (success/failure)
Verify 'Log in' modal opens and user login (success/failure)
Verify 'Next' and 'Previous' pagination buttons function correctly
Verify navbar links are clickable and lead to expected actions/pages
Verify carousel images display correctly and navigation works
risks: Modal accessibility (keyboard navigation, focus management, screen reader announcements)
Form accessibility (input labels, error message announcements for screen readers)
Dynamic content updates (product list, user name) for screen reader users
Color contrast issues in navigation or footer for text readability
Video accessibility (lack of captions/transcripts for 'About us' video)
Redundant links (e.g., 'Home' in brand and nav list, though common)
JavaScript reliance for core navigation (e.g., categories, login/logout actions)
